summary: Comprehensive testing of Real-time WebSocket Updates feature for Horizon Sports venue public pages. All 9 test cases passed successfully. The WebSocket-based real-time update system replaces the old 30s polling approach and provides instant updates to public page viewers when venue owners edit their venue details.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby on DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

backend_websocket_tests: 2. PUT /api/venues/{venue_id} (as owner) broadcasts venue_update message to connected WS clients - PASS
3. Venue update endpoint returns the updated venue with correct changes - PASS
4. WebSocket connection without valid venue_id handles gracefully - PASS
5. Owner can update own venue (200 OK) - PASS
6. Player cannot update venue (403 Forbidden) - PASS
7. Unauthenticated user cannot update venue (401 Unauthorized) - PASS
8. Can update all allowed fields (description, address, city, base_price, turfs, hours) - PASS
frontend_owner_dashboard_tests: 1. Login as demo@owner.com/demo123, navigate to /owner dashboard - PASS
2. 'Edit Details' button visible next to venue selector - PASS
3. Click 'Edit Details' opens dialog with all fields (name, description, address, city, base_price, turfs, hours) - PASS
4. Dialog shows 'Changes will be pushed live to all viewers of the public page instantly.' - PASS
5. Edit description and click 'Save & Go Live' - success toast appears - PASS
frontend_public_page_tests: 1. Visit /venue/powerplay-arena WITHOUT login - page loads - PASS
2. Live connection indicator visible at bottom-right of right column - PASS
3. Live indicator shows 'Live — updates instantly' (green dot + Radio icon) - PASS
4. Green animated pulse dot visible indicating active connection - PASS
5. Initial state shows 'Connecting...' before transitioning to 'Live' - PASS
integration_e2e_tests: 1. E2E: Connect WS → Owner updates venue via REST → WS receives venue_update message - PASS
2. E2E: venue_update message contains complete updated venue data - PASS
3. E2E: Description in WS message matches REST API update - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: VenueConnectionManager (venues.py lines 21-49) correctly manages WebSocket clients per venue_id
update_venue endpoint (line 248-266) correctly broadcasts to all connected clients after update
PublicVenuePage.js (lines 99-137) implements proper WS reconnection with exponential backoff (2s→4s→8s→30s max)
wsStatus state transitions: 'connecting' → 'live' on open, 'reconnecting' on close
Edit Venue Dialog in VenueOwnerDashboard.js (lines 170-200) has correct fields and save handler
Toast notification 'Venue details just updated by the owner!' fires on venue_update message
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket real-time updates feature fully tested. Key endpoints: WebSocket at /api/venues/ws/{venue_id} (uses venue UUID not slug), PUT /api/venues/{venue_id} for updates. Public page fetches venue by slug first to get id, then connects WS. WS URL pattern: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.replace('https', 'wss') + '/api/venues/ws/{venue_id}'. Owner dashboard shows Edit Details button that opens modal with live-push functionality.

mocked_apis.payment: MOCKED - Razorpay payment via mock-confirm endpoint

frontend.toast_message: Venue details just updated by the owner!
frontend.live_indicator: Green dot + Radio icon + 'Live — updates instantly'
